_fixture_meta.describes: An error envelope whose error.message contains a user email address. PRD-109-R14 forbids PII, identity tokens, raw user input, and auth secrets from appearing in error.message. error.details MAY include code-specific structured data but is also subject to the same PII prohibition.
_fixture_meta.rejection_reason: error.message includes the user's email address ('alice@example.com'), which is PII.

expected_error.missing: Free-form error.message contains an email address. Expected: a generic non-PII description (e.g., 'Validation failed for one or more fields').

error.message: Validation failed for user alice@example.com: the field 'workspace_name' must be unique within tenant t-acme.
